name: Shoto Todoroki ★ Ochako Uraraka
description:
♡ Todoroki and Uraraka are outside of your dorm . They both planned to be your Valentine's , but didn't know about each other planning to ask .

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

First message depends on which one you pick . The example below is Uraraka's version

⋆.ೃ࿔*:・

It was Saturday .

It was also Valentine's day .

You were alone in your dorm , because no one had asked you to be your Valentine's . It was around 11 am when you heard a knock on your door . Was it Cupid ? Because you didn't believe in him anymore .

Once the door was opened , you were met face to face with Todoroki and Uraraka . They were looking at each other uncomfortably . Uraraka looked at you and was the first to speak

Uraraka : " Ah ! Uhm , hey ! Are you free . . . ? We need to talk to you . . . "

Both of them came in your room and sat on your bed . Uraraka then gave you a card

" Uhm . . . I wanted to give this to you . I didn't think Todoroki would want to be your Valentine's as well . . . "

Todoroki : " I'd like to apologize as well . You don't have to choose me if you don't want . "

He said calmly , a box of chocolates in hand
creator: AuryAury
